summary: Comprehensive testing of teacher recitation link feature completed. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). The fix ensures: 1) Each teacher has their own stored recitation_link, 2) Admin can update teacher links via PUT /api/admin/teacher-link, 3) When admin updates a teacher's link, pending sessions are also updated, 4) GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/join-link returns the teacher's CURRENT recitation_link from their profile, 5) Frontend LiveClassroom.js fetches link from API instead of using hardcoded URL.
critical_code_review_comments: LiveClassroom.js correctly fetches recitation_link from /api/sessions/{sessionId}/join-link instead of using hardcoded URL
Session model now includes recitation_link field (line 123 in server.py)
update_teacher_link endpoint correctly updates both teacher profile and pending sessions (lines 1441-1467 in server.py)
get_session_join_link endpoint fetches teacher's CURRENT recitation_link from users collection, with fallback to session's stored link (lines 1740-1770 in server.py)
book_session stores teacher.recitation_link in session_data (line 1650 in server.py)
seed_data_creation: Test session and student user created and cleaned up after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher recitation link feature fully tested. All endpoints working: GET /api/admin/teacher-links, PUT /api/admin/teacher-link, GET /api/sessions/{session_id}/join-link. The join-link endpoint fetches the teacher's CURRENT recitation_link from their user profile, ensuring admin updates take effect immediately. Frontend LiveClassroom.js correctly fetches from the API.

verified_features.admin_get_teacher_links: PASSED - Admin can retrieve all teachers with their recitation_link field
verified_features.admin_update_teacher_link: PASSED - Admin can update a teacher's recitation_link
verified_features.link_propagation_to_sessions: PASSED - When admin updates teacher link, pending sessions are also updated
verified_features.join_link_endpoint: PASSED - Returns teacher's CURRENT recitation_link from their profile
